title: Boots, Bikes, and Bombers by Ginny Hill Wood – Available now
summary: Boots, Bikes, and Bombers is an intimate biography of Ginny Hill Wood, a pioneering Alaska conservationist, outdoorswoman and one of the founders of Alaska Conservation Foundation. Born in Washington in 1917, Wood served as a Women’s Airforce Service Pilot in World War II, and flew a military surplu...
